suggestedMessage:
Hi Khalid,

We noticed things have been quiet on your flowOrder store this past month — no orders coming through. We really want to make sure flowOrder is working for you.

Can we jump on a quick 10-min call to understand what's happening? Or just reply here and we'll sort it out together.

---

مرحبا خالد،

لاحظنا إنه ما في طلبات على متجرك في flowOrder خلال الشهر الماضي. نبي نتأكد إن التطبيق شغّال صح عندك.

نقدر نسوي مكالمة سريعة 10 دقائق؟ أو ارد هنا وبنحل الموضوع سوا.

context.dmSentiment: Said 'thinking of switching to something else' on 2026-04-09
